title: Graphify + Obsidian + Claude Code = CHEAT CODE
summary: Chase AI demonstrates combining Graphify's repository deconstruction capabilities with Obsidian's knowledge organization layer to enhance Claude Code's code understanding. The workflow allows merging knowledge graph insights into larger note vaults to improve model outputs.
writeup: Chase AI walks through a workflow that connects Graphify, Obsidian, and Claude Code for knowledge management and LLM-assisted coding. Graphify extracts repository structure, Obsidian serves as the knowledge vault, and the resulting insights feed into Claude Code to support context-aware code generation. The pipeline draws on knowledge graphs and retrieval-augmented generation to give the model grounding beyond a single prompt. The takeaway is a concrete chain for turning repository structure into reusable context for code generation.
